page1_content: Which build tool to choose is largely dependent on your experience and needs. Webpack-based setup offers more powerful features such as code splitting, processing static assets as module dependencies and extracting component CSS into a separate file, but can be a bit more complex to configure. Browserify can be easier to setup in scenarios where you don't need the advanced features that Webpack offers.
page2_content:
Redmine is a free and open source project management and issue tracking application. It is cross-platform and cross-database and built on top of the Ruby on Rails framework.
Redmine includes support for multiple projects, wikis, issue tracking system, forums, calendars, email notifications, and much more. 
In this tutorial, we’ll show you how to install and configure the latest version of Redmine on a Debian 9 server using MySQL as a database back-end and Passenger + Nginx as a Ruby application server.

Lorem ipsum has been standard since the 16th century, when an unknown typewriter took that number of letters and mixed them up to make a proof copy of a book.

page4_content:
It is a well-known fact that readers are distracted by readable text on a page when studying the layout. 
The point of Lorem Ipsum is that it gives a normal flow of words, as opposed to "Text here, Text here", and gives the impression of being readable text. 
Many publishing programs and web developers use Lorem Ipsum as test text, and a search for "Lorem Ipsum" reveals many web pages under development. 
Different versions have appeared over the years, sometimes by accident, sometimes on purpose (more or less humorous).
